gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一段错位的语音留言，让悲伤与浪漫在远方悄然相遇。
gems.whyWatchEn: A wrong-number voicemail turns grief into a cross-distance love story that feels fresh, tender, and unexpectedly funny.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真爱至上》式温暖小品、不介意慢节奏和催泪元素的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of warm, quirky rom-coms like 'Love Actually' who enjoy slow-burn emotions and a good cry.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 玩具老友们面对数字时代，用怀旧和幽默叩问童年的意义。
gems.whyWatchEn: A clever, heartwarming take on digital vs. physical play, with beloved characters navigating a world of screens and smart toys.
gems.audience: 皮克斯老粉、带娃家长，以及怀念传统玩具的80/90后。
gems.audienceEn: Pixar loyalists, parents with young kids, and millennials nostalgic for pre-screen childhoods.
